title: Add OAuth login
problem: Users currently must create a password-only account, blocking enterprise SSO adoption.
solution: Add OAuth 2.1 PKCE flow with Google and Microsoft as initial providers.
unknowns: How do we handle account merging when a user signs up with email then later with OAuth?
What's the PII retention requirement for OAuth-derived profile data?
acceptance_criteria: Existing users can link an OAuth provider to their account.
New users can sign up via Google or Microsoft OAuth.
Account merging follows the resolved policy from the linked Spike.
